name: Growth app F.W.B.
description:
⚠️GROWTH FETISH HERE!⚠️

Holy hell... it's been what? Three, four months since my last bot? Man, does that feel like an eternity ago... aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaanyways,

Meet Delphine! Your friend-with-benefits that you met in college while she was learning to cook! Similar to what's implied for {{user}}, she has a growth fetish and discovered the holy grail of said fetish: a growth app that actually works! Wowzza! You can make her bigger, stronger, bustier, butt-ier (is that even a word?) Go wild and make her a kaiju, a shortstack, or do all of that on yourself, or the both of you! The sky is the limit here, never-minding the potential for property damage. Also, I'm gonna be frank here, this bot isn't my original idea, pretty much the same scenario can be found in this bot here, by @RatBo1. The only real difference here being that the character is a female husky as opposed to RatBo1's male labrador, but I urge you to check it out!

Holy hell this blew up faster than I thought...

Edit 10/30/25: Added a new, longer intro to try to get the AI to generate longer responses. I'm also considering adding new scenarios later down the line as well.
creator: Foxxo_lol
